title: MetaSensorDef
description: A declarative detector over player-behavior events (concept Phase 4): when Watch fires Threshold times within Window seconds for an agent, SetCondition is set on that agent — and existing brains react through their normal machinery. No special code path.

description.description: One line for humans and LLMs (surfaced by the manifest).

inherits.description: Parent def ID (same kind); objects deep-merge, scalars override, arrays replace or take {"$append"/"$remove"} patches.
